name: Lippo Limited
summary: Lippo Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the food, property investment and development, treasury investment, securities investment, healthcare services, mineral exploration and extraction, and other businesses. It manufactures, wholesales, and retails food products and beverages, as well as bakery and pastry products; and operates and manages restaurants, food courts, caf√É¬©s, kiosks, and bakery corners. The company is also involved in the development, letting, sale, and resale of real estate properties; money market and securities investment activities; provision of healthcare management services; and exploration and extraction of minerals. In addition, it owns and operates a hotel; owns a motor yacht; and develops software products. Further, the company provides property, project, fund, and investment management services; money lending, management, commercial consulting, financing, and catering services, as well as real estate agency and consultancy services. It operates in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Republic of Singapore, Indonesia, Australia, and internationally. The company is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Lippo Limited is a subsidiary of Lippo Capital Limited.
